response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title '徒花ネクロマンシー' (Adabana Necromancy) from on-screen text. Performed a search for the lyrics using '徒花ネクロマンシー 歌詞 English lyrics' and found multiple sources, including sites like J-Lyric and Marumaru-X. Simplified the artist name to 'Franchouchou' (from the anime Zombie Land Saga) for the search. The performers in the video are VTubers Shirakami Fubuki, Nakiri Ayame, Houshou Marine, and Amane Kanata. Used the found lyrics to populate the fields.
response.global_summary: A musical performance by four virtual performers (Shirakami Fubuki, Nakiri Ayame, Houshou Marine, and Amane Kanata) singing the song 'Adabana Necromancy' from the anime Zombie Land Saga.

scenes.description: The four virtual performers sing 'Adabana Necromancy' on a stage with a traditional Japanese motif.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Nakiri Ayame, Houshou Marine, Amane Kanata
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰が弔う 死地は彼方
静寂を破り 芽吹いた夢を
誓え 穿て
重なる 屍 高みへ
届くまで
唸れ徒花 朽ち果てても進め
奪わせはしない 尊厳の愚弄に
飢餓を解き放て
枯れても走ることを命と呼べ
空に叫ぶ 脱・生存の定義
骨を斬らせて 闇を断て
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Who mourns? The land of death is afar
The dreams that budded, breaking the silence
Swear it, pierce through it
To the heights of the piled-up corpses
Until it reaches
Roar, fruitless flowers, even if you rot, move forward
I won't let them take it, the mockery of dignity
Unleash the starvation
Call the act of running even when withered 'life'
Shout to the sky, the definition of escape and survival
Let your bones be cut, and sever the darkness
